title: Spring strawberry soda starts
body: A dusty pink seasonal drink has joined the cafe menu.

title: Starter set consult event
body: We now offer a simple consult event for first time hamster owners.

title: Spring photo spot update
body: The in-store photo spot has been updated with a soft spring display.

title: New reward keyholder added
body: A limited color acrylic keyholder is now available for point exchange.
